regional_cost_note: Surveyors in Christchurch typically charge $1,300–$3,800 for a boundary survey, $4,500–$28,000+ for subdivision, and $900–$2,800 for a building setout. Canterbury rates are near the national average; post-earthquake rebuild experience is common across local trades. Title searches and LIM reports are recommended before any boundary-related work — your surveyor can advise.
